# Results

## Total Tau increase in response to ProNGF treatment

The images show total Tau in response to proNGF treatment.


\begin{figure}[htbp]
\centering
\includegraphics[width=3.5in]{figs/ColoredLabeledWB_Feb12.png}
\caption{Western blot analysis of Tau and actin expression. Composite image.}
\label{fig:labeled-wb}
\end{figure}

\begin{figure}[htbp]
\centering
\includegraphics[width=3.5in]{figs/ELINA_2026-02-12_12h52m48s_Composite_.jpg}
\caption{Representative composite image showing actin (blue) and Tau (green).}
\label{fig:actin-tau-composite}
\end{figure}

\begin{figure}[htbp]
\centering
\includegraphics[width=3.5in]{figs/ELINA_2026-02-05_12h18m48s_IRDye_800CW_.jpg}
\caption{Green channel image showing actin (mouse) and phospho-Tau (rabbit; pSer202/pThr205).}
\label{fig:actin-ptau-800}
\end{figure}

\begin{figure}[htbp]
\centering
\includegraphics[width=3.5in]{figs/ELINA_2026-02-06_13h04m41s_IRDye_680RD_.jpg}
\caption{Red channel image showing total Tau (pan-Tau ; Rb-237).}
\label{fig:tau-680}
\end{figure}

Only somas WB - same Experiment
\begin{figure}[htbp]
\centering
\includegraphics[width=3.5in]{figs/ELINA_2026-02-11_13h52m00s_IRDye_680RD_.jpg}
\caption{Red channel image showing phospho-Tau at Ser622 (pSer622).}
\label{fig:ptau-ser622-680}
\end{figure}

\begin{figure}[htbp]
\centering
\includegraphics[width=3.5in]{figs/ELINA_2026-02-13_10h47m12s_Composite_.jpg}
\caption{Red channel image showing phospho-Tau at Ser622 (pSer622), Green channel shows panTau (Red - Rb, Green - Ms)}
\label{fig:ptau-composite}
\end{figure}
